block_12: Digital Options are pretty similar to Binary Options in their logic. However, Digital Options have an additional feature that demands traders to make a more precise prediction: a strike price. This article overviews the distinctive features of the trading instrument and highlights the tips to succeed in DO trading.

block_20: Most Profitable Trade of the Week
block_46: The first existing multinational corporation that issued stocks was the Dutch East India Company, which was founded in 1602. At that time, stockholders couldn’t influence the company’s development since it was fully supervised by its directors. Nevertheless, the equity holders were generously rewarded during the 1st half of the 17th century — their dividends averaged 16% annually.
